headline: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
summary: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

raw.headline: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why

headline: Heron Bay Doubles Down on Vontier, Buying 1.37 Million Shares
summary: Vontier provides technology and services for global mobility infrastructure, supporting fueling, fleet, and diagnostics markets worldwide.
